title: I'am looking for a Monday.com expert to help us put the automations we would like in place
excerpt:

posts.author: CharlesT (Charles Tietard)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are a communication team of +/- 16 people divided into four sub teams.
We work on the basis of jobs (which are considered to be tasks that are an integral part of the team’s daily activity) and projects that are divided between different people in one or more teams.

We are looking for a person to help us structure and create automation between the different tables to better organise, dispatch and visualise the work of the entire department.

If you are fluent in french or dutch it’s a great advantage

posts.author: Cleopatra-upstream (Cleopatra Luneburg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @CharlesT

Welcome to the monday Community!

We have been partnered with monday.com since 2017.

We specialise in building custom workflows with integrations, automations as well as a range of various apps to make your monday.com platform even more powerful.

Please book in a complimentary non obligation session here to discuss further.

We look forward to hearing from you and working together.

Kind Regards,
Cleopatra Luneburg
upstream

posts.author: cnantz (Chad Nantz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @CharlesT,

Have you found someone to work with you on your boards/automations?
